'''鈭歾-zh-b''' ('''kazazhab''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:zincise|zincise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-zh-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zincise|zincise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歾-zh-b
|-
! Lemma
| kazazhab
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizazhab|thizazhab]] || [[word:jizazhab|jizazhab]] || [[word:shizazhab|shizazhab]] || [[word:kizazhab|kizazhab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuzazhab|thuthuzazhab]] || [[word:jujuzazhab|jujuzazhab]] || [[word:shushuzazhab|shushuzazhab]] || [[word:kukuzazhab|kukuzazhab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuzazhab|thuzazhab]] || [[word:juzazhab|juzazhab]] || [[word:shuzazhab|shuzazhab]] || [[word:kuzazhab|kuzazhab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuzazhab|thuzazhab]] || [[word:juzazhab|juzazhab]] || [[word:shuzazhab|shuzazhab]] || [[word:kuzazhab|kuzazhab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thezazhab|thezazhab]] || [[word:jezazhab|jezazhab]] || [[word:shezazhab|shezazhab]] || [[word:kezazhab|kezazhab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothozazhab|thothozazhab]] || [[word:jojozazhab|jojozazhab]] || [[word:shoshozazhab|shoshozazhab]] || [[word:kokozazhab|kokozazhab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thozazhab|thozazhab]] || [[word:jozazhab|jozazhab]] || [[word:shozazhab|shozazhab]] || [[word:kozazhab|kozazhab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozazhab|thozazhab]] || [[word:jozazhab|jozazhab]] || [[word:shozazhab|shozazhab]] || [[word:kozazhab|kozazhab]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:zazhab|zazhab]] || [[word:zazhab|zazhab]] || [[word:zazhab|zazhab]] || [[word:zazhab|zazhab]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:zazhab|zazhab]] || [[word:zazhab|zazhab]] || [[word:zazhab|zazhab]] || [[word:zazhab|zazhab]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:zazhab|zazhab]] || [[word:zazhab|zazhab]] || [[word:zazhab|zazhab]] || [[word:zazhab|zazhab]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:zazhab|zazhab]] || [[word:zazhab|zazhab]] || [[word:zazhab|zazhab]] || [[word:zazhab|zazhab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙zazhab|th忙zazhab]] || [[word:j忙zazhab|j忙zazhab]] || [[word:sh忙zazhab|sh忙zazhab]] || [[word:k忙zazhab|k忙zazhab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathazazhab|thathazazhab]] || [[word:jajazazhab|jajazazhab]] || [[word:shashazazhab|shashazazhab]] || [[word:kakazazhab|kakazazhab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thazazhab|thazazhab]] || [[word:jazazhab|jazazhab]] || [[word:shazazhab|shazazhab]] || [[word:kazazhab|kazazhab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thazazhab|thazazhab]] || [[word:jazazhab|jazazhab]] || [[word:shazazhab|shazazhab]] || [[word:kazazhab|kazazhab]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shazazhab|shazazhab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshazazhab|goshazazhab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishazazhab|gokishazazhab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shazazhabn眉|shazazhabn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshazazhabnkn眉|goshazazhabnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishazazhabn眉|gokishazazhabn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shazazhabsh毛|shazazhabsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshazazhabnksh毛|goshazazhabnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishazazhabsh毛|gokishazazhabsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazazhabro|shazazhabro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazazhabnkro|goshazazhabnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazazhabro|gokishazazhabro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shazazhabmu|shazazhabmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazazhabnkmu|goshazazhabnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazazhabmu|gokishazazhabmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shazazhabsher|shazazhabsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshazazhabnksher|goshazazhabnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishazazhabsher|gokishazazhabsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shazazhabng|shazazhabng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshazazhabnkng|goshazazhabnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishazazhabng|gokishazazhabng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shazazhabya|shazazhabya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshazazhabnkya|goshazazhabnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishazazhabya|gokishazazhabya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shazazhabyam|shazazhabyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshazazhabnkyam|goshazazhabnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishazazhabyam|gokishazazhabyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazazhabn眉sh毛|shazazhabn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazazhabnkn眉sh毛|goshazazhabnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazazhabn眉sh毛|gokishazazhabn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazazhabn眉ro|shazazhabn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazazhabnkn眉ro|goshazazhabnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazazhabn眉ro|gokishazazhabn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazazhabn眉mu|shazazhabn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazazhabnkn眉mu|goshazazhabnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazazhabn眉mu|gokishazazhabn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazazhabsh毛n眉|shazazhabsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazazhabnksh毛n眉|goshazazhabnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazazhabsh毛n眉|gokishazazhabsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazazhabsh毛ro|shazazhabsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazazhabnksh毛ro|goshazazhabnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazazhabsh毛ro|gokishazazhabsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazazhabsh毛mu|shazazhabsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazazhabnksh毛mu|goshazazhabnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazazhabsh毛mu|gokishazazhabsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazazhabron眉|shazazhabron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazazhabnkron眉|goshazazhabnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazazhabron眉|gokishazazhabron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazazhabrosh毛|shazazhabrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazazhabnkrosh毛|goshazazhabnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazazhabrosh毛|gokishazazhabrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazazhabromu|shazazhabromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazazhabnkromu|goshazazhabnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazazhabromu|gokishazazhabromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazazhabmun眉|shazazhabmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazazhabnkmun眉|goshazazhabnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazazhabmun眉|gokishazazhabmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazazhabmush毛|shazazhabmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazazhabnkmush毛|goshazazhabnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazazhabmush毛|gokishazazhabmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazazhabmuro|shazazhabmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazazhabnkmuro|goshazazhabnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazazhabmuro|gokishazazhabmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|17228b0}}
